prompt: A stylish blonde woman in a dynamic, playful pose jumping in front of large ornate royal blue double doors of a classic stone building. She is wearing a short white short-sleeved wrap dress with a tie waist, white sneakers, and a delicate necklace. Her right arm is raised high as she reaches to catch a bright yellow tennis ball in mid-air, while her left hand holds a colorful orange and white pleated handbag. Her blonde hair is flowing, one leg is bent up in a joyful motion, and she has a focused yet happy expression. The scene is brightly lit by natural sunlight. At the top of the image is the text 'LACOSTE' in large white elegant serif font next to the white Lacoste crocodile logo. At the bottom, the slogan 'LIFE IS A BEAUTIFUL SPORT' is written in white capital letters. High-fashion advertising photography style, vibrant colors, sharp details, cinematic lighting.
